new_cascade_issues.title: Power generation reduced
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding the power budget during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Mass imbalance
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel introduces an asymmetry in mass distribution, potentially affecting structural dynamics and thermal performance.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal imbalance
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel affects thermal balance, potentially increasing temperature gradients across the payload.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity impact
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel may affect structural integrity and vibration response, requiring reanalysis of mechanical constraints.
